summary.activeTargetSummary: Active target: stage dev -> environment dev -> solution Core (Core)
summary.bundleLifecycleSummary: The canonical bundle path is artifacts/solutions/Core.zip, but that zip is a generated artifact and may be absent until you pack local source from solutions or export the solution from Dataverse. Typical creation paths are pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip or pp solution export Core --environment dev --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip.
summary.bundlePlacementSummary: No generated bundle is currently present. When you create one, write it to artifacts/solutions/Core.zip and keep solutions for unpacked source.
deploymentRouteSteps: pp.config.yaml maps stage dev to environment alias dev and solution Core.
The alias resolves later through the external pp environment registry and its auth context.

The canonical bundle artifacts/solutions/Core.zip is not generated yet; create it with `pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip` or `pp solution export Core --environment dev --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip`.
summary.environmentAliasProvenance: Stage dev in pp.config.yaml selects environment alias dev. The alias name lives in the project config, but the actual Dataverse URL and auth profile are resolved later from the external pp environment registry.
